## Type of Change

<!-- Mark relevant options with [x] -->

- [ ] 📚 New documentation
- [ ] ✏️ Documentation update/improvement
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (typo, broken link, etc.)
- [ ] 🎨 Visual improvement (diagrams, formatting)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no content changes)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature guide

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with [x] -->

### Content Quality
- [ ] Content follows the [Style Guide](../STYLE_GUIDE.md)
- [ ] Used appropriate [template](../templates/) for page type
- [ ] All code examples tested and working
- [ ] No spelling or grammar errors
- [ ] Accurate technical information

### Structure and Navigation
- [ ] Proper frontmatter with title, description, and icon
- [ ] Correct heading hierarchy (H1 → H2 → H3)
- [ ] "Next Steps" section included with CardGroup
- [ ] Cross-references to related content added
- [ ] Entry added to docs.json if new page

### Accessibility and Formatting
- [ ] Images include descriptive alt text
- [ ] Tables have headers
- [ ] Links work correctly (no 404s)
- [ ] Code blocks have language tags
- [ ] Mintlify components used appropriately

### Testing
- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] Verified on mobile viewport
- [ ] Checked all internal links
- [ ] No build errors or warnings
